_comment: Heterogeneous sources (document / api / dialogue) feeding one ontological memory layer. Each fact is generated then validated against SHACL/OWL constraints with three outcomes: accept, correct (a non-ISO date is repaired to xsd:date), or reject (worksIn pointing to a non-Department, or an e-mail with no '@'). 'Eng' / 'Engineering' normalize to one Department node; Bob is recognized as a Person in the api source, so the later dialogue 'Carol works in Bob' is rejected by the sh:class constraint.

sources.content: Alice works in Eng. Alice joined on March 3, 2021. Alice can be reached at alice@acme.com.

content.speaker: hr
content.text: Carol can be reached at carol-at-acme.

sources.content: Dave works in Engineering. Dave joined on 2022-01-10.
